description: Product Description Our range of Kids Ankle Socks are made from fabrics designed to keep your feet feeling fresh These socks are very durable, designed to keep their shape and stay in place Socks that are soft and comfortable adapting to the shape of the ankle and foot to give a comfortable fit Cotton Rich fabric ankle socks giving a very soft comfortable fit which is moisture-wicking keeping your feet feeling fresh Girls Knee High socks with a grip top design to keep the sock knee high and avoid slippage Knee high socks that are soft and comfortable adapting to the shape of the ankle and foot to give a comfortable fit Cotton Rich fabric knee high socks giving a very soft comfortable fit which is moisture-wicking keeping your feet feeling fresh Colours to compliment school uniforms . Perfect for both School wear and Casual wear Cotton Rich fabric knee high socks with matching bow giving a very soft comfortable fit which is moisture-wicking keeping your feet feeling fresh Knee high socks with matching bow that are soft and comfortable adapting to the shape of the ankle and foot to give a comfortable fit Colours to compliment school uniforms . Perfect for both School wear and Casual wear Knee High socks with a matching silky bow .
